content.cn_text: 第一部分。你将听到一名男子打电话询问游泳课程的信息。
content.en_text: Section 1. You will hear a man telephoning to ask for information about swimming lessons.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间浏览第2页第1至第6题。
content.en_text: First, you have some time to look at questions 1 to 6 on page 2.

content.cn_text: 你会看到已经为你完成了一个例题。
content.en_text: You will see that there is an example that has been done for you.

content.cn_text: 只有这一次，与例题相关的对话会先播放。
content.en_text: On this occasion only, the conversation relating to this will be played first.

content.cn_text: Staff：你好，这里是 City Swim School。
content.en_text: Staff: Hello, City Swim School.

content.cn_text: Caller：哦，你好。我想咨询游泳课程，是班课，不是一对一。
content.en_text: Caller: Oh, hello. I wanted to ask about swimming lessons. That's in a class, not individual.

content.cn_text: Staff：好的。我们有不同级别的团体课程。
content.en_text: Staff: Right. Well, we do group lessons at various levels.

content.cn_text: 首先，我们有一个叫 water babies 的课程。
content.en_text: To start off with, we have what we call the water babies class.

content.cn_text: 第一个课程叫 water babies，所以空格中已经填入 babies。
content.en_text: The first class is called water babies, so babies has been written in the space.

content.cn_text: 现在正式开始。你需要边听边答题，因为录音不会播放第二遍。
content.en_text: Now we shall begin. You should answer the questions as you listen because you will not hear the recording a second time.

content.cn_text: 请仔细听，并回答第1至第6题。
content.en_text: Listen carefully and answer questions 1 to 6.

content.cn_text: Staff：你好，这里是 City Swim School。 Caller：哦，你好。我想咨询游泳课程，是班课，不是一对一。
content.en_text: Staff: Hello, City Swim School. Caller: Oh, hello. I wanted to ask about swimming lessons. That's in a class, not individual.

content.cn_text: Staff：好的。我们有不同级别的团体课程。首先，我们有一个叫 water babies 的课程。
content.en_text: Staff: Right. Well, we do group lessons at various levels. To start off with, we have what we call the water babies class.

content.cn_text: 这是面向三个月及以上婴儿的课程。 Caller：真的吗，这么小就可以？
content.en_text: That's for babies of three months and over. Caller: Really, as young as that.

content.cn_text: Staff：是的，那其实是最适合开始的时候。
content.en_text: Staff: Yes, that's really the best time to start.

content.cn_text: Caller：好的。我们确实有个宝宝，所以我记一下。他们在课上具体做什么？
content.en_text: Caller: Right. Well, we do have a baby, so I'll make a note of that. What do they actually do in the lessons?

content.cn_text: Staff：主要目标就是让他们熟悉水，让他们感受到水的存在。老师会让孩子们玩得开心。
content.en_text: Staff: Well, the main aim is just to familiarise them with the water, so they feel it is there. They get the children to enjoy themselves.

content.cn_text: 他们有很多玩具和其他东西，可以在水里玩。
content.en_text: They have lots of toys and things they can use to play with in the water.

content.cn_text: Caller：好的。课程多少钱？
content.en_text: Caller: Right. And how much do the lessons cost?

content.cn_text: Staff：课程在星期二上午上，每节课3.80英镑。严格来说它不算一个完整课程。
content.en_text: Staff: They're held on Tuesday mornings and each lesson costs £3.80. It's not really a course as such.

content.cn_text: Caller：好的。我会和我妻子商量一下。不过我其实是想咨询我自己的课程。
content.en_text: Caller: Okay. Well, I'll talk to my wife about that. But I was actually ringing about lessons for me.

content.cn_text: Staff：好的。那你是初学者吗？
content.en_text: Staff: Okay. So, are you a beginner?

content.cn_text: Caller：不完全是，但我游得不太好。
content.en_text: Caller: Not exactly, but I'm not very good.

content.cn_text: Staff：初级班主要是给完全没有游泳经验的人。
content.en_text: Staff: Well, the beginner's classes are really for people who don't have any experience of swimming.

content.cn_text: 课程会教你在水中呼吸的技巧，还会让你练习把头放进水里并睁开眼睛。
content.en_text: They aim to teach you techniques for breathing in the water, and they get you to do things like put your head underwater and open your eyes.

content.cn_text: Caller：好的。这个我能做到。
content.en_text: Caller: Okay. I can do that.

content.cn_text: Staff：课程结束时，他们的目标是让你能游五米。
content.en_text: Staff: And by the end of the course, they aim to have you swimming five metres.

content.cn_text: Caller：我觉得我大概勉强能做到。
content.en_text: Caller: I think I can probably just about do that.

content.cn_text: Staff：好的。那你更适合中级班。
content.en_text: Staff: Okay. So, you'd be better in the intermediate class then.

content.cn_text: 在那里你会学习主要泳姿，比如自由泳、仰泳等等。
content.en_text: That's where you learn the main swimming strokes, front stroke, back stroke and so on.

content.cn_text: Caller：那跳水呢？
content.en_text: Caller: What about diving?

content.cn_text: Staff：会的，他们会教你怎么diving。你还会做一些水下游泳。
content.en_text: Staff: Yes, they teach you how to do that. And you'd also do some underwater swimming.

content.cn_text: Caller：不是带氧气瓶那种吧？
content.en_text: Caller: Not with a tank or anything.

content.cn_text: Staff：哦，不是，不是水肺潜水，只是普通的水下游泳。
content.en_text: Staff: Oh no, not scuba, just ordinary underwater swimming.

content.cn_text: 在中级课程中，你还会学习水中安全，包括泳池里以及在其他地方游泳时的安全。
content.en_text: And in the intermediate course, you also look at water safety, both in the pool and when swimming in other places.

content.cn_text: Caller：好的。我觉得这个级别适合我。那它多少钱？
content.en_text: Caller: Okay. Well, that sounds the right level for me, I think. So, how much does that cost?

content.cn_text: Staff：一个课程61英镑，一共十节课。
content.en_text: Staff: 61 pounds for a course. That's ten lessons.

content.cn_text: Caller：你能再介绍一下这个班吗？班里会有多少人？
content.en_text: Caller: Can you tell me a bit more about the class? How many people would there be in it?

content.cn_text: Staff：中级班通常大约八到十人。这是我们的目标人数。
content.en_text: Staff: Well, the intermediate class is usually around eight to ten. That's what we aim at.

content.cn_text: 不过偶尔可能会达到十二人。
content.en_text: Though occasionally it might go up to twelve.

content.cn_text: Caller：好的。这个班级规模听起来挺合理，人不算太多。
content.en_text: Caller: Okay. That sounds quite a reasonable size, not too many.

content.cn_text: 这个班是给成年人上的，对吗？
content.en_text: And the class is for adults, is it?

content.cn_text: Staff：是的。
content.en_text: Staff: Yes.

content.cn_text: Caller：好的。顺便问一下，有高级班吗？
content.en_text: Caller: Okay. And just out of interest, is there an advanced class?

content.cn_text: Staff：有。高级班重点是发展更高效的游泳技巧，并提高你的速度。
content.en_text: Staff: Yes. They focus on developing more efficient swimming techniques and on working on your speed.

content.cn_text: 它们还会为竞技游泳做准备。
content.en_text: And they also prepare you for competitive swimming.

content.cn_text: Caller：好的。我想我还是会先从中级班开始。
content.en_text: Caller: Okay. Now, I think I'd want to start with the intermediate one, really.

content.cn_text: 在听剩余对话之前，你有一些时间浏览第3页第7至第10题。
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the conversation, you have some time to look at questions seven to ten on page three.

content.cn_text: 现在请听录音，并回答第7至第10题。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions seven to ten.

content.cn_text: Caller：那我还有什么特别需要知道的吗？
content.en_text: Caller: Now, is there anything special I need to know?

content.cn_text: Staff：课程在星期二上，第一节课是1月13日。
content.en_text: Staff: Well, the classes are on Tuesdays and the first lesson is on January the 13th.

content.cn_text: 所以你需要在那之前注册。最晚是1月8日，但名额很快会满，所以我建议你马上注册。
content.en_text: So you need to register before then. January the 8th is the latest, but it's filling up quickly, so I'd do it straight away.

content.cn_text: 你可以来这里拿表格，也可以从网上下载。课程时间是晚上7点半。
content.en_text: You can pick up a form here or get one off the internet. And classes are at 7.30pm.

content.cn_text: Caller：好的。那我只要穿着泳裤来就行了。我需要自己带毛巾吗？
content.en_text: Caller: Right. Then I just roll up with my swimming trunks. Do I have to bring my own towel?

content.cn_text: Staff：是的。不过我们会给所有参与者提供一顶游泳帽。
content.en_text: Staff: That's right. We provide all participants with a swimming hat, though.

content.cn_text: Caller：哦。我平时不怎么戴。
content.en_text: Caller: Oh. I don't usually wear one.

content.cn_text: Staff：其实我们确实要求戴泳帽。除此之外，它还能帮助教练识别你。
content.en_text: Staff: Well, we do insist on it, actually. It helps the instructor to identify you, apart from anything else.

content.cn_text: 哦，别忘了你需要一枚20便士硬币来使用储物柜。
content.en_text: Oh, and don't forget you need a 20p coin for the locker.

content.cn_text: Caller：哦，好的。嗯，我一直想学这个很久了。
content.en_text: Caller: Oh, okay. Right. Well, I've been meaning to do this for ages.

content.cn_text: 我真的需要多锻炼，而且大家都说游泳有益健康。
content.en_text: I really need to get some more exercise and everyone says swimming is good for your health.

content.cn_text: Staff：是的。很多人还发现游泳能提升他们的自信。
content.en_text: Staff: Yes. And a lot of people find it improves their confidence, too.

content.cn_text: 当然，它还可能救你的命，甚至救别人的命。
content.en_text: And of course it could save your life, or even someone else's.

content.cn_text: Caller：没错。好的，非常感谢。再见。
content.en_text: Caller: That's right. Okay. Well, thanks very much. Goodbye.

content.cn_text: Staff：再见。
content.en_text: Staff: Goodbye.

content.cn_text: 第一部分到此结束。你现在有半分钟时间检查答案。
content.en_text: That is the end of section 1. You now have half a minute to check your answers.

groups.desc:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.title: Questions 1-10

items.title: Focus: water familiarisation using 1. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第1题问 Water Babies 的 focus 是 water familiarisation using ______，原文说用 lots of toys 在水里玩，所以答案是 toys。

items.title: 2. __________ techniques
items.analysis: 答案解析：第2题在 Beginners 下，空格后是 techniques，原文说 techniques for breathing in the water，所以答案是 breathing。

items.title: introduction to 3. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第3题在 Intermediate 下，空格是 introduction to ______，原文提到会教 diving，所以答案是 diving。

items.title: 4. __________ in the water
items.analysis: 答案解析：第4题问 ______ in the water，原文说 water safety，所以答案是 safety。tank/scuba 是关于水下游泳方式的干扰解释。

items.title: class is for 5. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第5题问 class is for ______，原文确认 intermediate class 是 for adults。

items.title: improving 6. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第6题问高级班 improving ______，原文说 working on your speed，所以答案是speed。

items.title: Date when Intermediate course begins: Tuesday 7. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第7题问 Intermediate course begins 的日期，原文说 first lesson is on January the 13th。January the 8th 是最晚注册日期，不是开课日期。

items.title: Participants will be provided with a swimming 8. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第8题问 Participants will be provided with a swimming ______，原文说 swimming hat，所以答案是 hat。towel 是他问是否要自己带的物品，为干扰。

items.title: Bring change for the 9. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第9题问 Bring change for the ______，原文说 need a 20p coin for the locker，所以答案是 locker。20p coin 是 change 的具体金额。

items.title: Improvement in 10. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第10题问 Improvement in ______，原文说 improves their confidence，所以答案是 confidence。

source_label: 🍠@Listening 永不虾滑 · 仅供个人学习
source_credit: 此内容由🍠@Listening 永不虾滑整理，仅作为分享供个人使用；禁止商用、倒卖和引流。有问题请先仔细看🍠这个账号的置顶和分享贴。没有团队，不是机构，纯个人分享。督学和其他相关课程请咨询主页另一个号@心情有点虾滑（不回任何机经相关消息）。
